creator: hg@cally.queue.to
text:
In a multiline edit box or an email message, selecting
edit->check spelling

generates a "No dictionary available" dialog box stating
"could not check spelling because you do not have a dictionary installed..."
and offering a yes/no option to the opera.com site on installing aspell

Fix: 

No fix known.  Appears to be the same problem as ports/109427 except this
is occuring with Opera 9.20 and the language is en_US rather than 
ports/109427's non-en_US language setting
How-To-Repeat: 	
Attempt to edit->check spelling from a non-empty multile input field
